game_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Arcade Game
notes: No music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, tracks) are documented in available sources. Sources provide game development credits, regional differences, gameplay mechanics, and technical ROM specifications, but contain no audio/music composition details. Composer identified as Kozo Nakamura for NES version (arcade versions composed by Mutsuhiko Izumi and Miki Higashino).
